checklist.action: Keep public site checks passing before every resubmission.
checklist.evidence: Public HTTPS website, start page, verification page, sitemap, and robots file are published and checked by tools/check_public_site.py.
checklist.title: Website accessible and safe to visit

checklist.action: Use the readable pages first; raw JSON only when a reviewer asks for machine-readable data.
checklist.evidence: About, status, whitepaper, product, trust, and reviewer pages describe GCA without claiming approval, audit completion, or guaranteed market outcomes.
checklist.title: Clear token and project information

checklist.action: Run .venv/bin/python tools/check_public_site.py after each public-material change.
checklist.evidence: The public site checker validates canonical identity, current GCA/USDT route, public pages, raw JSON routing, sitemap, and robots.
checklist.title: No obvious placeholders or broken reviewer links

checklist.action: Add LinkedIn only if BaseScan specifically requires a third-party social-network profile.
checklist.evidence: Tim Chen is published on the team page and standalone official-domain professional profile with GitHub, X, Telegram, and role scope.
checklist.title: Founder and team transparency

checklist.action: Submit one clean BaseScan token-profile update from support@gcagochina.com, attaching the public evidence links and retaining private mailbox screenshots for reviewer follow-up.
checklist.evidence: The official project-domain mailbox support@gcagochina.com is active, public DNS records pass MX/SPF/DKIM/DMARC checks, inbound and outbound tests are archived privately, and public support/BaseScan materials publish the same domain email.
checklist.title: Sender email matches project domain

checklist.action: Keep the chain as Base Mainnet / chainId 8453 and contract address unchanged.
checklist.evidence: BaseScan source verification and deployer-wallet ownership verification are complete; the contract has fixed supply and no post-deployment mint function.
checklist.title: Verified source and fixed-supply token facts

checklist.action: Use the same 32x32 SVG logo URL and whitepaper URL in BaseScan.
checklist.evidence: SVG/PNG logos, social card, brand kit, and whitepaper are published over HTTPS.
checklist.title: Logo, brand kit, and whitepaper

checklist.action: Keep all public materials pointed to the GCA/USDT route, not the older WETH pilot pool.
checklist.evidence: Telegram, X, GitHub, and the official Base Mainnet GCA/USDT market route are published. GeckoTerminal token information is approved.
checklist.title: Official social links and market route
